activepieces.title: Activepieces
activepieces.price_range: Free (up to 10 active flows) / $5 per active flow per month thereafter

exa.title: Exa AI
exa.price_range: API pricing varies by endpoint, from $0.001/unit (e.g., summaries, contents endpoint) to $0.015/request (Exa Deep Reasoning). Websets plans range from $0 (free tier) to $449/month.

openhands.title: OpenHands
openhands.price_range: Free (open-source MIT, BYOK API costs) + Cloud free tier

stable-diffusion.title: Stable Diffusion
stable-diffusion.company: Stability AI (model); ecosystem includes Automatic1111, ComfyUI, InvokeAI
